title: Nika Turns the Battle
description: On pages 3–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, World Government, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3 as Luffy’s Gear Fifth form re-enters the battle while the giants arrive, Vegapunk’s broadcast begins, and the Five Elders become the island’s central threat.
scene: Luffy’s Gear Fifth form re-enters the battle while the giants arrive, Vegapunk’s broadcast begins, and the Five Elders become the island’s central threat.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: AYAAH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: JWAAM!! Wait, please!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He's wet-haired caribou...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What's his story?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's right! Please hold on!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You may be a pirate,

dialogue.speaker: World Government
dialogue.text: But this is a government island...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And there are people after the commodore's life.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You've got it all wrong! Please trust me!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you guys kill me here, commodore teach...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Will have your heads!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Oh??? and why is that?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Because I have extremely valuable information!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The kind that's hard to come by!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Information on the ancient weapons which bear the names of the gods... First is the curious power of fishman island's princess Shirahoshi, known as passion. Then, there's Plutton, sleeping underground in Wano.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The only people in the world who know the where- abouts of both are the straw hat crew and myself! Ke Hi Hi Hi Hi Hi Hi Hi Hi Hi Hi Hi Hi Hi Hi Hi Hi Hi Hi Hi Hi Hi Hi Hi Hi Hi Hi Hi Hi Hi Hi Hi Hi Hi Hi Hi Hi Hi Hi Hi

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: If you bring me to the commodore,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll surrender that information free of charge! I'm sure he'll be pleased!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Just take me with you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I know I can be of use!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Pull back from the shore!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We have to stop firing on the Pacificista!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Those damn bubble shields!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I never thought we'd learn about the power of the special science group like this!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: UWAH!!

summary: This part advances the Nika Returns on Egghead through 25 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
